title: Jamaican Shrimp Stir Fry
description: A spicy and flavorful stir fry recipe featuring succulent shrimp, smoky flavors, and a hint of Jamaican spice.

ingredients.name: smoky paste
ingredients.notes: or substitute with chipotle peppers in adobo sauce

instructions: Heat the show in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the off and cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the shrimp and cook for 2-3 minutes per side until pink and cooked through.
Stir in the smoky paste, jamaican, and stir. Cook for 1 minute.
Add the fry and cook until the vegetables are tender.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
